old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-s2zx","title":"[security] non-constant-time pubkey comparison in coap_keys.c TOFU","description":"In lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c:412, lichen_key_store_put() uses regular memcmp() on 32-byte pubkey for TOFU pinning check. This creates a timing side-channel. Project already has public_key_ct_compare() in replay.c:27-36 for exactly this purpose (constant-time XOR diff). Also affects find_key_locked() on IIDs at line 370. Matches reviewer focus on key handling + crypto timing. OSCORE/EDHOC/Schnorr/MIC not directly touched in last 20 commits (mostly bd auto-commits + one CBOR fix in coap_keys). No obvious issues in Schnorr48 verify or OSCORE ctx from quick scan of recent merges.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T02:54:52.240196008Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T02:54:52.240196008Z"}
